name: toggle
description: On/off switch built as an accessible button

meta.name: Toggle
meta.description: On/off switch built as an accessible button

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Whether the control is checked on first render (uncontrolled).

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the control and removes it from the tab order.

whenToUse: Flipping a single binary setting that takes effect immediately (e.g. notifications on/off)
On/off state where a physical switch metaphor reads better than a checkmark
Settings screens where the change applies live without a separate submit
whenNotToUse: Selecting items in a form that is submitted later — use Checkbox
Choosing one option among several mutually exclusive labels — use SegmentedControl or Radio

antiPatterns.bad: <Toggle label="I accept the terms" /> inside a submitted form
antiPatterns.why: A switch implies an instant on/off setting; agreement that is submitted with the form is a checkbox

related.name: Checkbox
related.reason: Use for form selections submitted later rather than instant settings

related.name: SegmentedControl
related.reason: Use when choosing among several exclusive options, not just on/off

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a <button role="switch"> with aria-checked reflecting state, so assistive tech announces it as a switch and Space/Enter toggle it via native button activation.

flexibility.note: Track and thumb colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-* / radius / focus-ring tokens
Optional label describing the setting being toggled
